prompt: Build complete audience intelligence for a fitness influencer targeting men aged 30-45 who want to build muscle while managing busy professional schedules. The influencer sells online coaching programs and is active on Instagram and YouTube. Produce the full AIF.
expected_output: A complete Audience Intelligence File (AIF) with demographics, psychographics, platform behavior analysis for Instagram and YouTube, language mining with exact phrases from the target audience, competitor audience analysis of 5+ fitness influencers, and pain/desire mapping with surface, deeper, and root pain layers.
assertions: Demographics section populated with age range, gender split, location
Psychographics include values, interests, lifestyle, and worldview
Platform behavior covers at least Instagram and YouTube
Language mining contains specific words and phrases the audience uses
Pain expressions include how-they-describe-problems with 3+ entries
Competitor analysis covers 3+ competing fitness accounts
Desire mapping includes stated, unstated, and identity desires
Output follows YAML structure of the AIF template

prompt: Produce audience intelligence for a B2B SaaS company selling project management software to marketing agencies with 10-50 employees. They want to build organic content on LinkedIn and Twitter/X. The main competitors are Monday.com, Asana, and ClickUp.
expected_output: AIF tailored to B2B audience with professional context emphasis, LinkedIn and X platform behavior analysis, B2B-specific language mining (industry jargon, pain expressions around agency operations), and competitor audience analysis of Monday.com, Asana, and ClickUp content audiences.
assertions: Professional context section is detailed (agency industry, job levels)
Platform behavior covers LinkedIn and X/Twitter specifically
Pain mapping reflects agency operational challenges
Competitor analysis covers Monday.com, Asana, and ClickUp
Content consumption patterns reflect B2B buying behavior
Best posting times consider business hours
